title: ranunculus fiorii
intro: Ranunculus fiorii, also known as the lesser celandine, is a flowering plant belonging to the buttercup family. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which help to soothe skin irritations, wounds, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Ranunculus fiorii include reducing inflammation, promoting skin health, and supporting the immune system, making it a popular remedy for various ailments. Herbal preparations of Ranunculus fiorii can be found in the form of tinctures, salves, and infusions, which are often used to treat cold sores, eczema, and other skin conditions.
